constraints: Do not modify active baseline promotion state.
Treat always-on MetaBlooms governance as mandatory baseline governance; cartridge governance is additive.
Verify artifacts against expectations before increasing trust.
Keep FL16 BLOCKED_NOT_PROMOTED distinct from FL17 export/package PASS.
Update tracker state evidence to current receipt/handoff; reject stale tracker state.
Use compact tracker only; no box or pipe layout.
decision: Build a repaired full OS candidate from the FL17-MERGE-5 candidate with 5R validation artifacts and corrected tracker evidence, then validate with bounded archive-native recovery proof.
root_cause: Prior FL17-MERGE-5 used heavy external archive commands/full extraction as promotion gates; those timed out even though archive-native Python checks complete quickly. The fix is a bounded recovery proof using checksum, central directory, unsafe-path scan, zipfile.testzip, and selective extraction/read of boot-critical artifacts.
